---
title: "patient_risk_analtyics-report"
author: "Piotr Banaś, Jan Krupa"
date: "2026-04-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r project}
#1. Data import
library(tidytuesdayR)
library(tidyverse)

data_import <- tt_load('2023-10-24')
patients_data <- data_import$patient_risk_profiles
head(patients_data)

#2. Preliminary checks - situation, where we have doubled gender
gender_data_frame <- patients_data %>% 
  select(personId, contains("FEMALE"), contains("MALE")) %>%
  filter(`Sex = FEMALE` == `Sex = MALE`) %>%
  head(100)
print(gender_data_frame)

#3.1 - removal of problematic rows by Sex
patients_data <- patients_data %>% 
  filter(`Sex = FEMALE` != `Sex = MALE`)
nrow(patients_data)

#3.2 - removal of problematic rows by age
age_check <- patients_data %>% 
  mutate(age_sum = rowSums(across(starts_with("age group")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(age_sum != 1)

print(paste("WRONG:" , nrow(age_check)))

patients_data <- patients_data %>% 
  mutate(age_sum = rowSums(across(starts_with("age group")), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(age_sum == 1) %>%
  select(-age_sum)

nrow(patients_data)
#4.1 - adding new column regarding life period
patients_data <- patients_data %>%
  mutate(life_period = case_when(
    `age group:   0 -   4` == 1 | `age group:   5 -   9` == 1 | 
    `age group:  10 -  14` == 1 | `age group:  15 -  19` == 1 ~ "0-19",
    ###################################################################
    `age group:  20 -  24` == 1 | `age group:  25 -  29` == 1 | 
    `age group:  30 -  34` == 1 | `age group:  35 -  39` == 1 ~ "20-39",
    ###################################################################
    `age group:  40 -  44` == 1 | `age group:  45 -  49` == 1 | 
    `age group:  50 -  54` == 1 | `age group:  55 -  59` == 1 | 
    `age group:  60 -  64` == 1 ~ "40-64",
    ###################################################################
    `age group:  65 -  69` == 1 | `age group:  70 -  74` == 1 | 
    `age group:  75 -  79` == 1 | `age group:  80 -  84` == 1 | 
    `age group:  85 -  89` == 1 | `age group:  90 -  94` == 1 ~ "65+"
  ))
ncol(patients_data)
#5.1 - adding a polipharmacy index and amount of drugs taken by one person
patients_data <- patients_data %>%
  mutate(
    how_many_drugs = rowSums(across(c(
      contains("Antibiotics"), 
      `STEROIDS in prior year`,
      `Acetaminophen exposures in prior year`,
      `Aspirin exposures in prior year`,
      `Opioids in prior year`,
      `ANTIEPILEPTICS in prior year`,
      `HORMONAL CONTRACEPTIVES in prior year`
    )), na.rm = TRUE),
    polypharmacy = as.integer(how_many_drugs >= 5) 
  )
nrow(patients_data)
```
